seeds.value: Define your fraud risk policy here. Example: auto-block score above 0.95, manual review 0.7-0.95, pass below 0.7.
seeds.description: Risk thresholds and actions for fraud scoring

seeds.value: Define key fraud signals here. Example: velocity_spike, geo_mismatch, unusual_amount, new_device, off_hours.
seeds.description: Signals the detector uses to assess fraud risk
